goal: Research and score 5 new local service business prospects with weak websites across fresh verticals (locksmiths, movers, auto glass, landscaping), load them into CRM as outreach_drafted, and prepare email-ready contact records.
success_criteria: 5 new leads created in CRM with stage=outreach_drafted, score>=65, and verified contact info including email
Prospect research JSON files written to artifacts/prospects/ for each new lead

slices.task: Research 5 real local service businesses across fresh verticals using web_fetch only (no X Search — API exhausted). Target: Denver/Boulder/Fort Collins area. Verticals: locksmith (1), movers (1), auto glass (1), landscaping (2). For each: find their website URL, assess weaknesses (no HTTPS, slow, no mobile, outdated design, no booking, broken contact form), locate contact email via site source/contact page/footer. Score each lead. Write prospect research JSON to artifacts/prospects/<name>-20260429-<time>_website_audit_research.json. Insert into CRM: sqlite3 /Users/ryleebenson/Desktop/OPENCLAW/data/crm.sqlite "INSERT INTO leads (id,name,type,source,stage,score,contact_info,notes) VALUES ('<id>','<name>','<type>','website-audit','outreach_drafted',<score>,'<contact_json>','<notes>')". Write the full research table to artifacts/missions/new-prospect-research-20260429-0658/bridge-research.md.

Read bridge-research.md. Verify: (a) sqlite3 /Users/ryleebenson/Desktop/OPENCLAW/data/crm.sqlite 'SELECT id,name,stage,score FROM leads ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5' — confirm 5 new outreach_drafted leads exist, (b) verify each lead has a non-null contact_info with email field, (c) spot-check 2 prospect websites via curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' to confirm they're real and accessible, (d) confirm the scoring criteria are applied consistently. Write artifacts/missions/new-prospect-research-20260429-0658/sentinel-verify.md with: new lead count, score range, verticals covered, and verdict. Append SCORE_EVENT to _shared/scoring/history.jsonl for outreach.

reasoning: 68 sends out, pipeline needs fresh inventory. The outreach_drafted pipeline has been drawn down by recent send missions. Researching 5 new prospects in fresh verticals (locksmiths, movers, auto glass, landscaping) diversifies the pipeline beyond HVAC/plumbing/dental and creates immediately sendable leads. 2-slice mission uses web_fetch for research (GREEN per BOOT.md) and sqlite3 for CRM writes (Python CRM broken). This directly feeds the next send cycle with new targets.
